subject:
Re: Can't run. The message("there was an error loading the
 specified boxnet model for picking) pops up
body:
Dear Dimitry

First of all, Thank you for replying.
I followed your advice so that change the path of the BoxNet model folder 
as the all-Latin character. The path of the BoxNet model is as follows
C:\Warp\boxnet2models\BoxNet2_20180602
C:\Warp\boxnet2models\BoxNet2Mask_20180531
Even though i changed it, I can't run the Warp. But the pop-up messages are 
changed a little bit as below. 
I'm sorry to bother you, but please help me....

<https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-E45a71lfBKo/Wz7ySMyKwXI/AAAAAAAAAL8/P11zA1a6g2UqrrFYbvyA0OaUvmXQw6jrwCLcBGAs/s1600/%25EC%25BA%25A1%25EC%25B2%2598.PNG>




2018년 7월 5일 목요일 오후 11시 18분 27초 UTC+9, Dimitry Tegunov 님의 말:
>
> Dear Donghyun,
>
> is it possible that you have some non-Latin characters in the path to the 
> BoxNet model folder? I just tried including a Korean character in the 
> folder name, and it appears TensorFlow can't handle it properly. I'm afraid 
> the only immediate workaround would be to make sure the paths are 
> all-Latin. I'll look into modifying the TensorFlow interface, but this 
> might take a while and there is no guarantee I will succeed.
>
> Cheers,
> Dimitry
>
> On Thursday, July 5, 2018 at 9:55:15 AM UTC+2, kukudas wrote:
>>
>> When i click the "Start pressing", The message("there was an error 
>> loading the specified boxnet model for picking) pops up. How do i overcome 
>> this problem?
>> Please help me.....
>>
>>
>> <https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-4rv9JeVSc4s/Wz3O0VH4FHI/AAAAAAAAALc/bkB-Lmv9UW0zcJGfKfBYKSSlWFn2ncx3ACLcBGAs/s1600/KakaoTalk_20180705_164205200.jpg>
>>
>>
